calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Lawrence Wong, Esq., for and with Chiu Chong Chan, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel reports as to the status of efforts to locate additional heirs. At the conclusion of testimony, the court indicates that it intends to either continue this matter to allow for additional efforts to locate heirs or appoint petitioner with full authority but with a bond. Counsel requests that the court appoint his client. The court states of its intent to appoint the Petitioner as Administrator of the Estate with full authority and full bond of $743,000.00 and a Status Hearing for Aug-09-2027. No objection to the court's intent is presented and the subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Feb-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Continued To Jan-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lawrence Wong appeared via zoom for and with Chiu Wong (petitioner) .


Discussion was held regarding the real property located in San Francisco, that they intend to sell the property, that they're ongoing efforts to locate the children have been unsuccessful, they are waiting for the US General Consulate in Hong Kong to give them any information if they have located the children in Hong Kong. The matter is continued to January 5, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Robles. Not reported.
